title: Notifications - Update failed OFF
scenario: No failure notification appears when firmware update fails and Device Software Update notifications are disabled in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to App Settings.
Toggle 'Device Software Update Notifications' to OFF.
Connect to a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2).
Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
Initiate a firmware update (DFU) for the connected device.
During the DFU process, put the Poly Studio Mobile app into the background (e.g., press Home button).
While the app is in the background, turn off the Bluetooth audio device (e.g., press and hold Power button to power off).
Wait a few seconds, then bring the Poly Studio Mobile app back to the foreground.
Observe whether any failure notification appears on the app screen or in the Android notification tray.
expected: No failure notification should pop up on the app screen or appear in the Android notification tray, because Device Software Update Notifications are turned OFF.
